titleEn: The Goose That Laid the Golden Eggs
summaryAm: ትዕግሥትን፣ ምስጋናን እና በቂ መሆንን የሚያሳይ ታሪክ።

source.name: Aesop's Fables
source.notes: Use only public-domain source material. Create original Amharic adaptation with softened conflict.

pages.textAm: የወርቃማ እንቁላል ዝይ ታሪክ በቅርቡ ይመጣል።
pages.textEn: The Goose That Laid the Golden Eggs story is coming soon.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A gentle goose sits near a small golden egg in a warm farmyard.

pages.textAm: ይህ ገጽ ምስጋናን እና ትዕግሥትን ይዘጋጃል።
pages.textEn: This page will prepare the gratitude and patience moment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A family looks at the golden egg with wonder and gratitude.

pages.textEn: The story will end by learning contentment.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The family cares for the goose kindly in a peaceful ending.
